notes: Actual performance depends on CPU/GPU/NPU, memory pressure, quantization, context length, and operating system.
For sensitive data, run Ollama in local-only mode and review the runner privacy settings.

profiles.purpose: Very small local checks, rewriting, simple classification, low-memory machines.
Light technical-consultant drafts, summaries, classification, low-cost local experimentation.
Balanced local reasoning and summary workflows with good responsiveness.
Stronger technical-consultant reasoning and report drafting.
Large local analysis, richer consultant reports, slower but higher quality.
High-memory workstation local reasoning. Use only if latency is acceptable.
